overview: D2U Studio is a premium architecture and interior design studio website for Wahid and Jasim. Features an editorial dark theme inspired by archcraft-studio.vercel.app with bold serif headings, numbered project listings (P.01 format), full-bleed photography, and an admin panel for full content management.
features: Animated splash screen with D2U wordmark
Hero slideshow with full-bleed images (4s autoplay)
Numbered project gallery P.01 format with category filters
Editorial dark theme — pure black, Cormorant Garamond, gold accents
About page with animated expertise/skill bars
Services section with minimal editorial layout
Admin panel: manage hero images, projects, founders, settings
